coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of high aspirations and gratitude for new opportunities, yet your abysmal Sleep and Training completion—mirroring the "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness" you acknowledge—demonstrates a critical disconnect between your declared intentions and your physical discipline, indicating you're failing to lock in the foundational energy required to execute at an elite level.
